subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that casteth remembrance upon all the worlds and guideth the heedless unto the Ridván of God, the Most Exalted, the Most Great [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح یلقی الذکر علی العالمین و یهدی الغافلین الی رضوان الله العلی العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
